/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so -o libgtest_main.so CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o   -L/home/RZS/A06_ws/build_isolated/tf_broadcaster/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src  -Wl,-rpath,/home/RZS/A06_ws/build_isolated/tf_broadcaster/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src:/home/RZS/A06_ws/build_isolated/tf_broadcaster/gtest/googlemock/gtest -lpthread libgtest.so -lpthread
